# zstack_backup_storage (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage backup storage in ZStack. Supported types include ImageStoreBackupStorage, CephBackupStorage, and SftpBackupStorage.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the backup storage.
- `type` (String) The type of backup storage: ImageStoreBackupStorage, CephBackupStorage, or SftpBackupStorage.

### Optional

- `attached_zone_uuids` (List of String) List of zone UUIDs to attach this backup storage to.
- `description` (String) A description for the backup storage.
- `hostname` (String) The hostname or IP address of the backup storage server (required for ImageStore and Sftp types).
- `mon_urls` (List of String) List of Ceph monitor URLs (required for Ceph type).
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The SSH password for the backup storage server (required for ImageStore and Sftp types).
- `pool_name` (String) The Ceph pool name (for Ceph type).
- `ssh_port` (Number) The SSH port for the backup storage server (for ImageStore and Sftp types).
- `url` (String) The URL/path for the backup storage (required for ImageStore and Sftp types).
- `username` (String, Sensitive) The SSH username for the backup storage server (required for ImageStore and Sftp types).

### Read-Only

- `available_capacity` (Number) The available capacity of the backup storage in bytes.
- `state` (String) The state of the backup storage.
- `status` (String) The status of the backup storage.
- `total_capacity` (Number) The total capacity of the backup storage in bytes.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the backup storage.
